meta.title: BST Audit Log
meta.description: Tracks which files have been reviewed, when, and by whom. Used by /review and /audit skills to identify stale content and prioritize updates.

schema.path: File path relative to repo root
schema.category: data | paper | note | toy | tool | config
schema.last_audited: YYYY-MM-DD or null if never audited
